case_title: NAVARRETE CARLO MARIO VS CRUZ AURELIO S

docket_entries.description: ON REMAND 9/13/95(JUDGMENT). THE JUDGMENT CONTAINS AN ERROR ON ITS FACE. THE TWELVE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TOTAL $3750 WHEREAS THE TOTAL JUDGMENT WAS WRITTEN
